title: Synthesis and Spectroscopic Characterization of Furan-2-Carbaldehyde-d
author: Jonas Jaster
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here, we present a protocol for the one step synthesis of the title compound in quantitative yield using adapted Vielsmeier conditions. The product was characterized by  1 H-, 2 H-, 13 C-NMR- as well as IR and Raman spectroscopy. Spectral data are given in detail.
steps_raw: Here, we present a protocol for the one step synthesis of the title compound in quantitative yield using adapted Vielsmeier conditions. The product was characterized by  1 H-, 2 H-, 13 C-NMR- as well as IR and Raman spectroscopy. Spectral data are given in detail.
